selection_basis: Selected over TOC hit at line 324 (heading followed by page number 26) and cross-reference at line 2020 ('as more fully described above under the heading'); verified narrative content at line 1565 with dates (June 2014, August 2015, March 2016, July 2016), party names (Thoma Bravo, Board, Special Committee, Barclays, Goodwin), and multi-paragraph chronology; end boundary at line 1963 before 'Recommendation of the Board and Reasons for the Merger' at line 1964
